model.name: final_trainpool_tiny_fixed_cp
model.runtime_strategy: full-frame acquire at imgsz1536, stereo-match-driven single ROI tracking at 1024x576 imgsz960

notes: The promoted checkpoint is the best current deployable full-frame recall result on the frozen final raw benchmark.
Small fixed-exposure balls remain the known weak case; this promotion does not claim the final recall target is solved.
